title: logistic-gof-benchmark: reproducibility materials for a large-scale goodness-of-fit benchmark for logistic regression under sparse data
description: Simulation drivers, aggregated rejection-rate results, low-birth-weight real-data example, and figure code reproducing the paper 'Benchmarking Goodness-of-Fit and Calibration Algorithms for Logistic Regression Classifiers: A Large-Scale Simulation Study under Sparse Data.' Benchmarks ~25 GOF and calibration tests across 5 covariate distributions x 5 sample sizes x 10,000 replications, plus four power scenarios and a real-data application. Complements the ebrahim.gof R package.

creators.name: Ebrahim, Ebrahim Khaled
creators.affiliation: Department of Applied Statistics, Faculty of Business, Alexandria University, Egypt
